description_long: This is a large, traditional half-timbered building with a steeply pitched, reddish-brown tiled roof and multiple dormer windows. The facade features a combination of exposed wooden beams and light-colored brickwork, characteristic of rural or historic European architecture. The front side has a row of white-framed windows and a central entrance, while the rear includes large barn-style double doors, suggesting a blend of commercial and residential or storage use. The roof is punctuated by a chimney and several skylights, providing both ventilation and natural light. Surrounding the base are small patches of greenery and shrubbery, adding to the building's inviting appearance. The overall structure is robust and solid, with clear indications of its function as a real estate agency in a village or small-town setting.
description: A large, half-timbered real estate agency with a steep tiled roof, white-framed windows, and barn-style doors, blending historic charm with commercial function.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with white-framed windows and a prominent half-timbered facade.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the long, steeply pitched tiled roof with multiple skylights and a chimney, as well as the extended brick and timber wall.
description_view_2: The rear view features large barn-style double doors and additional windows, emphasizing the building's mixed-use character.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays a continuous row of windows and the full expanse of the tiled roof, with minimal greenery at the base.
